overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western game showing exploration of an abandoned wooden house at night. The player picks up a lantern, discovers a body inside, exits the building, and explores the foggy wilderness with a distant view of a town.

events.description: player character picks up lantern from wooden cabinet

agents.ego_description: moving through dimly lit kitchen, examining shelves and picking up a lantern

entered.detail: dark wooden cabinet with drawers and countertop
empty wooden shelves mounted on wall
antique metal stove with pipe extending upward

segments.scene_description: The player explores a dimly lit rustic kitchen with wooden walls and vintage furnishings. After picking up a lantern from a cabinet, they move toward a doorway leading deeper into the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark back room with scattered furniture

events.description: moving from kitchen into darker back room of the house

agents.ego_description: cautiously entering dark room, illuminating the space with lantern

notable_agents.action: dead body lying face down on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The player enters a darker back room illuminated only by the lantern, revealing a wooden table with chairs and a disturbing discovery of a dead body on the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: hallway and staircase leading to exit

events.description: ascending from ground floor to upper level via staircase
opening wooden door to exit the house

agents.ego_description: moving through hallway, climbing stairs, and opening the exit door

entered.detail: panelled wooden door with metal handle

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the dark room behind, ascends a wooden staircase, and approaches the exit door, preparing to leave the house.

events.description: exiting house into foggy night exterior environment
transition from interior darkness to moonlit foggy exterior

agents.ego_description: walking around the house exterior and covered porch area

entered.detail: wooden wall exterior of the house with weathered planks
white brick support pillars for porch roof
wooden planked porch floor extending from house

segments.scene_description: Stepping outside into the foggy night, the player explores the covered porch with brick pillars before moving away from the house into the surrounding wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant town view

agents.ego_description: walking through grassy terrain toward a distant viewpoint overlooking a town

entered.detail: large boulders and rocks in the field
warm lights from buildings visible in the far distance
scattered trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the house into the open wilderness, the player traverses a foggy grass field with scattered trees and rocks, eventually revealing a panoramic view of a distant town glowing with lights across the valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic, dimly lit interior of an abandoned house into a vast, foggy nocturnal wilderness. It begins in a rustic kitchen where the camera picks up a lantern from a cabinet before moving through a doorway into a darker back room. As the lantern light reveals a dead body on the floor, the camera retreats from the scene, ascending a wooden staircase toward the exit. The scene then shifts from the enclosed wooden structure to the open air, passing across a covered porch with brick pillars and stepping out into the misty night. Finally, the camera traverses a foggy grass field scattered with rocks and trees, gradually opening up to reveal a panoramic view of a distant town glowing with lights across the valley.
